_comment: Tempdoc 632 — the jk1 `checkLicense` allowlist. Authored in jk1's display-name vocabulary (matched as exact-or-whole-string-regex). Permissive licenses are allowed by `moduleLicense`; the dual-licensed deps (logback/JNA/jhighlight, which the jk1 normalizer collapses to their LGPL side) and the unusual case (jcip-annotations CC-BY) are allowed by `moduleName` so a future GENUINELY copyleft dependency still fails the build. Derived from a full `generateLicenseReport` over runtimeClasspath. Re-run after dependency changes; see scripts/codegen/license-overrides.json for the matching NOTICE attribution. (junrar/UnRar was removed in tempdoc 632 — the Tika RAR parser is excluded, eliminating the product's only non-OSI dependency.)

allowedLicenses.moduleLicense: Similar to Apache License but with the acknowledgment clause removed

allowedLicenses._note: dual EPL-1.0 / LGPL-2.1 — claimed under EPL-1.0
dual EPL-1.0 / LGPL-2.1 — claimed under EPL-1.0
dual Apache-2.0 / LGPL-2.1+ — claimed under Apache-2.0
dual Apache-2.0 / LGPL-2.1+ — claimed under Apache-2.0
dual CDDL-1.0 / LGPL-2.1+ — claimed under CDDL-1.0
CC-BY-2.5 annotations jar (jk1 reports no license) — permissive, accepted
